<!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="zh-CN"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <title>获取文章数据</title> </head> <body> <h1>📝 获取文章数据</h1> <button onclick="getData()">获取数据</button> <div id="output"></div> <script> function getData() { const data = localStorage.getItem('talent-showcase-local-data'); if (data) { const parsed = JSON.parse(data); const articles = parsed.articles || []; let html = `<h2>文章总数: ${articles.length}</h2>`; html += '<ul>'; articles.forEach((article, index) => { html += `<li>[${index}] ID: ${article.id}</li>`; }); html += '</ul>'; html += '<textarea style="width:100%;height:400px;">' + JSON.stringify(articles, null, 2) + '</textarea>'; document.getElementById('output').innerHTML = html; } } </script> </body> </html>
